Example-025.task: The “CLOSED” status and distance (“2.07 miles”) are both styled in the same red color, which creates confusion since red typically signals urgency or negative status only. This makes it harder to quickly distinguish between informational (distance) and status (closed). Keep “CLOSED” in red, but change the distance text to a neutral color (e.g., gray or black) to improve clarity and visual hierarchy.
